reviews.review_description: You.

Man I do not know how to like download the “companion app”.
!!!all I want to do is show people how I do puppet shows so pleeeeeeeeassssssse make it easier pleeeeeeeeeeeaaaaaaaaassssssss!!!if ya do I’ll love ur game just please make it easier please so so... bye👋👋👋

I tried three platforms (mobile, tablet and PC) and two different WiFi networks (shared and private) and I couldn’t get the app to connect to the Quest. Worst of all, there’s no error reporting built into the software, so it just sits there when it won’t connect. And there’s no support site anywhere. The websites for the application and the company are -literally- composed of 5 pages. 

Do NOT support a company that thinks they can just slap up an application and not support it. They’re not bothering to take care of us, so let’s not take care of them.
The app is not on android

Great great great. The only small thing would be to allow for bigger parties, say 8ish not sure if downtime would be too much.
Also sometimes the players choice is not the one displayed in ios app after the answer is accepted (ie Einstein shown but Jean of ark is shown)
This is a very fun and polished game that is fun for the whole family!

For a free title it's great. 

Would be even better if there was an option to only have one person use the VR headset, instead of forcing you to switch after several rounds.
Makes you think you can play with more than two people on oculus but you can’t connect more than one device.   Very disappointing.

reviews.review_title: Taking charades into a new level!!
reviews.review_description: Great for family or friends game night. It provides adequate selection of words that keeps the game interesting and engaging for everyone.
Fun to play.
Play this game with my family and it’s SOO much fun! Definitely a great free game!

reviews.review_title: There’s a reason this game is free...
reviews.review_description: ...and that’s because it doesn’t work.
This game is not good for me and my friends it doesn’t work and we have great connection also it won’t connect

Definitely a neat little game with a fun concept that allows multiplayer with just one headset. My only complaint is that the instructions aren’t very clear/correct. For example, it tells you to click Host Game when connecting to the app, but while I did get it to work I didn’t see that option anywhere. It took a little tinkering till I figured it out, which could be remedied by updated, clearer instructions. Other than that I think it’s a good little game worth the download, especially since you can’t beat the price.

So I'm on a Android and I looked up Puppet fever on my phone it said the app wasn't compatible for my Android can you please make it compatible for all Android devices cuz the game looks really fun and I emailed you so I hope you see at least one of them

reviews.review_title: Great experience for friends and family
reviews.review_description:
I found this game from BMF and i downloaded it immediately but, when I went to find the app on my iPad it wasn’t there! If anyone could tell me how to find it on iOS pls tell me 

 Update: I found it on iOS App Store and this is and great experience on the oculus quest. Would highly recommend if u have a lot of friends.Please note that the internet connection can be a bit dodgy at times.

It is very fun and social game. 👍

Could you make the cards maybe to have a language choice option? I am from Slovenia, I understand English, but some of my friends do not and it can be difficult sometimes.

The game works great on the quest and is very fun to play with family and friends, and there are a lot of topics that you can play out and with a lot of variety, from stuff like ”seacow” and ”kitchen” to more obscure things like ”attacked by goats” and ”you can lead a horse to water but you can’t make it drink” (the you should get bonus points for both guessing and succeding to play out the proverbs, they can be incredibly hard to figure out) 

The only problem I have is that the phone app has a tendency to crash while you play, forcing you to restart the session completely and making you keep score on a paper if you want to compete.
If they would fix this issue i would gladly pay for the extra themes they have available.

Not really an issue, but if the developers would have a few more of the puppets available at all times (you get a few specific ones depending on the chosen theme, and then you have some that are constantly available) that would be really great.

Not sure how to play this game? Don’t bother going to the web site or perusing the companion app. You’ll find nothing.

So Many questions I had: why are there hinges behind the stage (am I missing a feature)? How do we get more than one person in the audience? What are the objectives of and differences between  each game?
